whoami.name: Ray Chen
whoami.education: Dongguan University of Technology · CS · junior · expected 2027
bio: Proficient in building frontend user interfaces with React and backend services with Node.js, and experienced in using AI tools to assist workflows.
Long-term follower of the Ethereum ecosystem, with experience in developing smart contracts using Solidity.
Possesses gas optimization skills and is familiar with wallet integration, on-chain interactions, and common EVM standards.
Also familiar with the Uniswap v3 protocol.

gui.name: Ray Chen
gui.education: Dongguan University of Technology · CS · junior · expected 2027
aboutParas: ~1 year of Web3 experience. Proficient in building frontend user interfaces with React and backend services with Node.js, and experienced in using AI tools to assist workflows.Long-term follower of the Ethereum ecosystem, with experience in developing smart contracts using Solidity. Possesses gas optimization skills and is familiar with wallet integration, on-chain interactions, and common EVM standards. Also familiar with the Uniswap v3 protocol.

ayeProject.title: Aye — Human-in-the-agent-loop on-chain AI agent
ayeProject.subtitle: ETHGlobal Open Agents hackathon · solo
description: Aye is a human-in-the-agent-loop AI agent for Ethereum (Sepolia), built across three workspaces: a DeepSeek-powered TypeScript core that polls prompts and turns natural-language requests into structured on-chain intents (Uniswap V3 swaps, ETH/ERC20 transfers, approvals, WETH wrap/unwrap, …); Solidity contracts that supply an audit log and a whitelist for accountability; and a Vite/viem web front-end where a human reviewer says "yes" or "no" before any transaction is signed and broadcast.
The wallet owner — not the model — becomes the safety layer.
